blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,144 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
